headline: The Cigna Group Foundation Launches 2026 Grant Program to Support Veterans
summary: The Cigna Group Foundation, the philanthropic arm of The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI), has opened its 2026 Improving Veteran Mental Health grant cycle. Nonprofit organizations serving veterans in ten priority states – Arizona, Connecticut, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Missouri, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, and Texas – are invited to apply nowthroughJuly 9 at 5:00 pm ET.

headline: Eli Lilly Wins Back CVS Health, Reverting Novo's Advantage
summary: Eli Lilly and Company just secured a big win as it looks to expand GLP-1 access, mending its partnership with top pharmacy benefit manager CVS Health.

headline: Cigna Stock: Is CI Underperforming the Healthcare Sector?
summary: While Cigna has lagged behind the broader healthcare sector over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s prospects.
